what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger entry that records an attachment (att-14728521) of type images in the design-assets channel, pointing to the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Users5 and noting when it was added.
observations: The entire content is YAML front matter with no body text.
target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-assets/icons/Users5.
id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added keys are present.
standouts: Attachment target is an image URI for the Users5 icon in the design-assets channel.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter for structured metadata.
References assets with a channel-scoped image:// URI.
concerns: No explicit filename, size, MIME type, or checksum for the attachment.
Target URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
No indication of who added the attachment or why.
notes: A minimal, timestamped metadata stub linking an attachment ID to a design-assets channel image.
questions: What does the Users5 icon look like and what is its intended use?
Who added this attachment and in what message or context?
Is the target image://design-assets/icons/Users5 currently available?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as a channel attachment ledger entry, which matches the metadata fields it contains; no explicit stated purpose is given beyond the record itself.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific image asset (Users5 icon) was attached to the design-assets channel at a precise time, creating a traceable link between an attachment ID and the asset.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme for the target is a notable convention; otherwise the record is a standard metadata stub.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed reference that maps an attachment identifier to a channel image asset, which a fused system could use to correlate attachments with design assets.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment ledger entry for att-14728521 in the design-assets channel, typed as images, targeting image://design-assets/icons/Users5 and added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To record that the Users5 icon image asset was attached to the design-assets channel at a specific time.
